selection: 按 7–10 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 蓝色；a. 蓝色的, 下流的, 忧郁的
words.definition: n. blue color or pigment; resembling the color of the clear sky in the daytime

words.translation: a. 古代的, 古老的, 年老的, 旧的
words.definition: s. belonging to times long past especially of the historical period before the fall of the Western Roman Empire

words.translation: n. 花, 开花植物, 精华, 盛时；vi. 开花, 发育, 旺盛, 成熟
words.definition: n. a plant cultivated for its blooms or blossoms

words.translation: n. 山, 山脉, 大堆
words.definition: n. a land mass that projects well above its surroundings; higher than a hill

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 太阳, 日, 日光, 阳光；vt. 晒
words.definition: n. the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system

words.translation: n. 黑暗, 夜, 黄昏, 模糊；a. 黑暗的, 暗的, 深色的, 隐密的, 模糊的, 无知的
words.definition: n. absence of light or illumination

words.translation: n. 城堡, 象棋中的车；vt. 置于城堡中, 盘踞于
words.definition: n. a large building formerly occupied by a ruler and fortified against attack

words.translation: a. 奇怪的, 陌生的, 生疏的, 不熟悉的, 不可思议的, 外行的, 外地的, 异乡的
words.definition: a. being definitely out of the ordinary and unexpected; slightly odd or even a bit weird

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: n. 天空, 天色, 天堂；vt. 击向空中, 挂在高处
words.definition: n. the atmosphere and outer space as viewed from the earth

words.translation: n. 地球, 泥土, 世界, 尘世；vt. 埋入土中, 赶入洞内
words.definition: n. the 3rd planet from the sun; the planet we live on

words.translation: n. 邪恶, 不幸, 罪恶；a. 邪恶的, 不幸的, 有害的, 讨厌的
words.definition: n. morally objectionable behavior

words.translation: a. 害怕的, 恐怕的, 遗憾的
words.definition: a. filled with fear or apprehension

words.translation: vt. 忘记, 忽略, 忘；vi. 忘记
words.definition: v. dismiss from the mind; stop remembering

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: a. 富裕的, 富饶的, 浓厚的, 贵重的
words.definition: a. possessing material wealth

words.translation: a. 令人惊奇的, 奇妙的, 极好的
n. 锯子, 谚语；vt. 锯, 锯开, 来回移动
words.definition: n. hand tool having a toothed blade for cutting

words.translation: n. 忿怒；vt. 激怒, 使发怒
words.definition: n. a strong emotion; a feeling that is oriented toward some real or supposed grievance

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 平原, 草原, 朴实无华的东西, 无格式；a. 简单的, 明白的, 平常的, 不好看的, 朴素的, 清晰的, 普通的, 平坦的, 十足的
words.definition: n. extensive tract of level open land

words.translation: a. 光亮的, 了不起的, 灿烂的, 壮丽的, 显著的, 杰出的
n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的
words.definition: n. gathering of producers to promote business

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的
words.definition: n. coins made of gold

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏
words.definition: n. an emotion experienced in anticipation of some specific pain or danger (usually accompanied by a desire to flee or fight)

words.translation: n. 灰色, 暗淡；a. 灰色的, 灰白的, 面色苍白的, 年老的, 老练的, 阴沉的
words.definition: n. a neutral achromatic color midway between white and black

words.translation: a. 聪明的, 精明的
words.definition: s. showing inventiveness and skill

words.translation: n. 暴风雨, 骚动, 风波, 风暴, 猛攻；vi. 起风, 猛冲, 怒吼
words.definition: n. a violent weather condition with winds 64-72 knots (11 on the Beaufort scale) and precipitation and thunder and lightning

words.translation: n. 边缘, 尖锐, 刀刃, 优势；vt. 使锐利, 挤进, 镶边
words.definition: n. the boundary of a surface

words.translation: a. 重的, 巨大的, 沉重的, 笨重的, 过度的；adv. 沉重地
words.definition: a. of comparatively great physical weight or density

words.translation: n. 工作, 运转, 劳动；a. 工作的, 劳动的, 经营的, 抽搐的, 运转的
words.definition: n. a mine or quarry that is being or has been worked

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: adv. 两次, 两倍
words.definition: r. two times

words.translation: a. 丑陋的, 邪恶的, 险恶的, 不祥的；n. 丑陋的人(或物)
words.definition: a. displeasing to the senses

words.translation: a. 向上的；adv. 以上
words.definition: s. directed up

words.translation: n. 魔术, 魔法；a. 魔术的, 有魔力的, 不可思议的
words.definition: n. any art that invokes supernatural powers

words.translation: a. 高的, 长的, 夸大的；adv. 夸大地
words.definition: a. great in vertical dimension; high in stature

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
a. 有力的, 有权力的, 强大的；[机] 强力的
words.definition: a. having great power or force or potency or effect

words.translation: n. 荒野, 荒地；a. 野性的, 野蛮的, 野生的, 失控的, 任性的, 杂乱的, 轻率的, 狂热的, 疯狂的
words.definition: n. a wild primitive state untouched by civilization

words.translation: a. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地
words.definition: s. isolated from others

words.translation: n. 球, 舞会, 球状物；v. 捏成球形
words.definition: n. round object that is hit or thrown or kicked in games

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: a. 深的；adv. 深入地
words.definition: a. relatively deep or strong; affecting one deeply

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；vt. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制
words.definition: n. a mechanical device that you ride for amusement or excitement

words.translation: n. 微笑, 喜色, 笑容；vi. 微笑, 觉得好笑
words.definition: n. a facial expression characterized by turning up the corners of the mouth; usually shows pleasure or amusement

words.translation: a. 有学问的, 学术上的；learn的过去式和过去分词
n. 巨人, 大力士, 巨大怪物；a. 庞大的, 巨大的
words.definition: n. any creature of exceptional size

words.translation: n. 欢喜, 乐事, 高兴；vt. 使快乐, 令人高兴
words.definition: n. the emotion of great happiness

words.translation: n. 宫, 宫殿, 华丽大厦
words.definition: n. a large and stately mansion

words.translation: n. 路径, 小路, 道路, 途径, 路线, 轨道
words.definition: n. a way especially designed for a particular use

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的
words.definition: n. English phonetician; one of the founders of modern phonetics (1845-1912)

words.translation: n. 种子, 籽, 萌芽, 子孙, 精液；vt. 在...播种, 催...发育, 脱...籽
words.definition: n. a small hard fruit

words.translation: n. 直线, 直；a. 直的, 笔直的, 正直的, 直接的, 连续的, 整齐的
words.definition: n. a poker hand with 5 consecutive cards (regardless of suit)

words.translation: adv. 突然, 意外, 忽然, 迅速, 即席作成, 即刻, 急速
words.definition: r. happening unexpectedly

words.translation: a. 极大的, 巨大的, 无限的
words.definition: s. unusually great in size or amount or degree or especially extent or scope

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: a. 金的, 含金的, 金色的, 贵重的, 繁盛的
words.definition: s. marked by peace and prosperity

words.translation: n. 心跳(声), 打, 敲打声, 拍子；v. 打, 拍打, 打败
words.definition: n. a regular route for a sentry or policeman

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: n. 外面, 外表, 外界；a. 外面的, 外表的, 外界的
words.definition: n. the region that is outside of something

words.translation: n. 和平, 和约, 治安, 和睦, 安宁, 静寂；vi. 安静下来, 不作声
words.definition: n. the state prevailing during the absence of war

words.translation: n. 废物, 垃圾, 胡说
words.definition: n. worthless material that is to be disposed of

words.translation: a. 天生的；bear的过去分词
words.definition: a. brought into existence

words.translation: n. 灵魂, 心灵, 精神, 精髓, 人, 化身, 典型, 鬼魂；a. 黑人的
words.definition: n. the immaterial part of a person; the actuating cause of an individual life

words.translation: n. 呼吸, 气息, 瞬间
words.definition: n. the process of taking in and expelling air during breathing

words.translation: n. 憎恨, 恨, 厌恶；vt. 憎恨, 憎恶
words.definition: n. the emotion of intense dislike; a feeling of dislike so strong that it demands action

words.translation: n. 王国, 领域
words.definition: n. a domain in which something is dominant

words.translation: a. 很少的, 微小的
n. 塔, 高楼, 堡垒；vi. 高耸, 翱翔
words.definition: n. a structure taller than its diameter; can stand alone or be attached to a larger building

words.translation: n. 带子, 队, 乐队；v. 联合, 结合
words.definition: n. instrumentalists not including string players

words.translation: n. 群众, 一伙人；vt. 拥挤, 挤满, 挤进
words.definition: n. a large number of things or people considered together

words.translation: n. 狭窄部分, 隘路；a. 狭窄的, 仔细的, 有限的, 勉强的, 狭隘的, 手紧的
words.definition: n. a narrow strait connecting two bodies of water

words.translation: n. 痛苦, 疼痛, 辛苦；vt. 使痛苦, 痛苦
words.definition: n. a symptom of some physical hurt or disorder

words.translation: n. 力量, 实力, 强度, 浓度, 人数, 抵抗力
words.definition: n. the property of being physically or mentally strong

words.translation: n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: n. 凉爽, 凉爽的空气；a. 凉爽的, 冷淡的, 冷静的
words.definition: n. the quality of being at a refreshingly low temperature

words.translation: n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.translation: n. 饮料, 酒；v. 喝, 喝酒
words.definition: n. a single serving of a beverage

words.translation: n. 饲料, 一餐, 饲养；vt. 喂, 饲养, 放牧, 靠...为生
words.definition: n. food for domestic livestock

words.translation: a. 新鲜的, 新奇的, 另外的, 淡的, 精神饱满的, 冒失的；adv. 最新地, 刚刚
words.definition: a. recently made, produced, or harvested

words.translation: n. 玻璃, 玻璃杯, 透镜；vt. 装玻璃于, 反射, 反映
words.definition: n. a brittle transparent solid with irregular atomic structure

words.translation: n. 热, 热度, 体温, 高潮；vi. 加热, 激昂, 加剧
words.definition: n. a form of energy that is transferred by a difference in temperature

words.translation: n. 疾病, 坏事, 罪恶, 灾难；a. 生病的, 邪恶的, 不吉利的, 敌意的, 不良的, 不顺利的
n. 举起, 帮助, 昂扬, 电梯；vt. 升高, 提高, 鼓舞, 清偿, 空运, 举起, 剽窃
words.definition: n. the act of giving temporary assistance

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个
words.definition: r. not at all or in no way

words.translation: n. 秘密, 机密, 秘诀, 秘方；a. 秘密的, 极机密的, 隐蔽的, 暗中的, 神秘的, 偏僻的
words.definition: n. something that should remain hidden from others (especially information that is not to be passed on)

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币
words.definition: a. yielding readily to pressure or weight

words.translation: n. 军人, 士兵, 兵蚁；vi. 从军, 尽职, 偷懒, 磨洋工
words.definition: n. an enlisted man or woman who serves in an army

words.translation: n. 演讲, 说话, 谈话, 言语, 引语, 民族语言
words.definition: n. (language) communication by word of mouth

words.translation: n. 石头, 宝石, 果核, 纪念碑, 结石；vt. 投扔石子, 铺石头
words.definition: n. building material consisting of a piece of rock hewn in a definite shape for a special purpose

words.translation: a. 不牢固的, 弱的, 虚弱的, 软弱的, 无力的, 无权力的, (论据等)不充分的
words.definition: a. wanting in physical strength

words.translation: n. 污垢, 泥土
words.definition: n. the state of being covered with unclean things

words.translation: n. 军队, 陆军
words.definition: n. a permanent organization of the military land forces of a nation or state

words.translation: n. 笑, 笑声；vi. 笑, 大笑
words.definition: n. the sound of laughing

words.translation: n. 紫色, 帝位；a. 紫色的, 帝王的, 华而不实的
words.definition: n. a purple color or pigment

words.translation: n. 宽松长袍, 礼服, 披肩, 覆盖物；v. (给)穿长袍
words.definition: n. any loose flowing garment

words.translation: n. 美, 美人
words.definition: n. the qualities that give pleasure to the senses

words.translation: n. 开始
words.definition: n. the event consisting of the start of something

words.translation: n. 平稳, 风平浪静；a. 平静的, 冷静的
n. 王冠, 王权, 顶点；vt. 使成王, 加冕, 居...之顶

words.translation: n. 财富, 运气, 兴隆, 大量财产, 好运, 命运
words.definition: n. a large amount of wealth or prosperity

words.translation: n. 土壤, 土地, 国家, 国土, 温床, 污物, 粪便, 水池；vt. 弄脏, 污辱

words.translation: adv. 不知何故
words.definition: r. in some unspecified way or manner; or by some unspecified means

words.translation: v. 攀登, 上升, 爬；n. 攀登, 爬升
words.definition: v. go upward with gradual or continuous progress

words.translation: vt. 挖, 翻土, 发掘；vi. 挖掘
words.definition: v. turn up, loosen, or remove earth

words.translation: n. 宴会, 酒席, 享受, 节日；vt. 款待, 享乐, 请客
words.definition: n. something experienced with great delight

words.translation: n. 门, 牌楼, 大门, 通道, 闸；vt. 装门于
words.definition: n. a movable barrier in a fence or wall

words.translation: a. 高兴的, 喜欢的, 情愿的
words.definition: a. showing or causing joy and pleasure; especially made happy

words.translation: n. 草, 草原, 牧场
words.definition: n. narrow-leaved green herbage: grown as lawns; used as pasture for grazing animals; cut and dried as hay

words.translation: n. 意义, 含义, 目的, 意图；a. 意味深长的
words.definition: n. the message that is intended or expressed or signified

words.translation: a. 沉默的, 安静的, 无声的, 静止的
words.definition: s. marked by absence of sound

words.translation: n. 银, 银币, 银器；a. 银的, 银制的, 银器的
words.definition: n. a soft white precious univalent metallic element having the highest electrical and thermal conductivity of any metal; occurs in argentite and in free form; u

words.translation: n. 符咒, 魅力, 轮值, 轮班, 工作时间, 一次发作；vt. 拼写, 拼成, 琢磨, 理解, 招致, 轮换, 迷住
words.definition: n. a verbal formula believed to have magical force

words.translation: a. 厚的, 粗壮的, 浓的, 迟钝的, 浑浊的, 多雾的, 过分的, 口齿不清的；adv. 厚地, 密地, 浓浓地
words.definition: a. not thin; of a specific thickness or of relatively great extent from one surface to the opposite usually in the smallest of the three solid dimensions

words.translation: a. 明智的, 慎虑的, 聪明的, 博学的, 狡猾的, 机灵的；vi. 知道
words.definition: a. having or prompted by wisdom or discernment

words.translation: a. 宽广的, 辽阔的, 广大的, 显著的；adv. 宽阔地
words.definition: s. not detailed or specific

words.translation: a. 坏掉的, 打破的, 断掉的；break的过去分词
words.definition: a. physically and forcibly separated into pieces or cracked or split

words.translation: a. 感兴趣的
words.definition: a. having or showing interest; especially curiosity or fascination or concern

words.translation: num. 十六, 十六个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of fifteen and one

words.translation: adv. 到处, 贯穿全部地, 自始至终；prep. 遍及, 在各处
words.definition: r. from first to last

words.translation: a. 赤裸的, 缺少的, 无遮蔽的, 坦率的；vt. 使赤裸, 露出

words.translation: n. 船长, 指挥官, 海军上校, 首领；vt. 率领, 指挥
words.definition: n. an officer holding a rank below a major but above a lieutenant

words.translation: n. 椅子, 显要的席位, 主席；vt. 使入座, 使就任要职
words.definition: n. a seat for one person, with a support for the back

words.translation: a. 干净的, 清白的, 简洁的；adv. 清洁地, 完全地
n. 衣服
n. 角落, 转角, 窘境；vt. 迫至一隅, 垄断, 使陷入绝境
words.definition: n. a place off to the side of an area

words.translation: vt. 除, 除外；vi. 反对
n. 行使, 执行, 运动, 练习, 作业；vt. 运用, 练习, 运动
words.definition: n. the activity of exerting your muscles in various ways to keep fit

words.translation: adv. 往前, 以后, 向外
words.definition: r. forward in time or order or degree

words.translation: n. 守卫者, 警戒, 护卫队, 防护装置；vt. 保卫, 看守, 当心
words.definition: n. a person who keeps watch over something or someone

words.translation: v. 热爱（love的过去分词）
n. 小人物, 无名小卒；pron. 无人, 没有人
n. 包裹, 套装软件, 包, 包装用物, 程序包；vt. 包装, 打包
